features: Safe Material: 100% food-grade PP material and stainless steel blade, SCS Certified
V-shaped Holder: for holding 6-20mm different size and multiple shape medication ( oblong, round or triangle)
Easy to Use: Unique V-shaped design to firmly grip the pill and accurately cut it. Just put your pills and press the cutter
Compact & Portable: Only 8.9 cm long. Pocket size. Suitable for daily use and travel
A Valuable Tool: Not only suitable for elderly people and children who have difficulty swallowing, but also for dogs and cats who take half a pill
description: Product Description Cut Your Pills Easily and Accurately V-shaped Holder It can grip almost all size pills. Perfect for all shapes of meds. (Diameter must less 2.5cm) The sharp blade cut pills accurately time after time. Easy to Clean Detachable Design: After cutting, the pill powder will fall in the bottom through the slits. We can remove the chassis and pour the powder out. Simple & Perfect Pill Splitter It's made of food-grade and lasting PP Materials. Compact size: 8.9*3.6*2.8 cm. A valuable tool for your family and pets.
